name: Dill Herb Fillets
recipeIngredient: 2 lb FISH FILLET OF RED SNAPPER
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange fish in a single layer on an oiled shallow baking dish.
2. Sprinkle with olive oil, parsley, shallots, dill weed, and oregano.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F until the flesh separates when tested with a fork—15 to 20 minutes.
4. Baste twice with pan juices while baking.
5. Remove fish to a serving dish.
6. Blend lemon juice into pan drippings, then pour over fish.
